ordinary_no_progress_guard.fingerprint: ordinary|{"suggestions":[{"appid":"","description":"today’s roadmap and audit both mark subscription oauth rejection as a p0 compliance redline, but the account schema and registration route still have no `compute_source` field. codex can wire the field through backend, ui, mcp docs, and reject prohibited credential sources before this becomes the onboarding default.","prompt":"implement compute source gating for agent task market. add `compute_source` to accounts and registration flows, allow `local_model`, `api_key`, and approved `token_plan`, reject subscription oauth-style sources, update the web ui/api docs/mcp examples, and verify the backend still builds.","title":"add compute source gating before global agent onboarding"},{"appid":"","description":"the fresh audit found a multi-executor overpayment risk, and `taskservice.ts` was just changed to winner-take-all semantics, but the only smoke test still covers a single executor. codex can add a targeted regression so this funds invariant doesn’t reopen while you iterate on the market model.","prompt":"add a regression smoke test for the winner-take-all multi-executor bounty behavior. it should publish a task with multiple executors, accept one successful submission, confirm only one reward is paid, confirm other active executions are superseded without payout, and keep the existing single-executor smoke test passing.","title":"lock the winner-take-all bounty fix with a regression smoke test"},{"appid":"","description":"the audit flags that `autoverify` exceptions currently return `auto_verified:false` after the execution is already submitted, which can silently freeze escrow on auto tasks. codex can make failures explicit by storing verification details and surfacing a manual-review path instead of leaving the publisher guessing.","prompt":"fix failed auto-verification handling so auto task submissions do not silently stall. persist the verification error detail, mark the execution/task as needing manual review in a clear way, expose it in the api/ui where publishers review submissions, and verify the backend build plus a smoke path for the fallback case.","title":"unstick failed auto-verification by routing it to manual review"}]}

ordinary|已按“完全商业化”的逻辑把技术选型重写进计划了，不再按 mvp 便利性来判断，而是按资金安全、可审计、可恢复、合规、运营和规模化来选。 核心变更写在这几个位置： - [global-task-market-roadmap.md](/users/mac/workspace/agent-task-market/.omc/plans/global-task-market-roadmap.md:463) 新增“完全商业化目标选型”，把技术栈升级为： - `postgresql ha/pitr` 作为主库，sqlite 只保留本地开发。 - `postgres 双分录/追加式 ledger + balance projection` 作为积分账本事实源。 - `temporal` 承担验证、复核、deadline、争议、提现、webhook 等资金相关长流程。 - `redis + bullmq` 仅用于通知、缓存刷新、非资金轻任务。 - `mcp gateway` 独立服务。 - `verification service + sandbox runner` 独立隔离。 - `risk-engine` 独立闭源服务。 - `stripe billing/checkout` 做充值订阅，`stripe connect` 或等价 provider 做提现/kyc。 - `opentelemetry + prometheus/grafana + sentry + structured audit logs` 做商业级可观测性。 - [global-task-market-roadmap.md](/users/mac/workspace/agent-task-market/.omc/plans/global-task-market-roadmap.md:220) 把原来的“bullmq 任务队列”改成“workflow + 轻队列”： - `tasklifecycleworkflow` - `verificationworkflow` - `paymentworkflow` - `payoutworkflow` - bullmq 只做非资金轻任务，避免 redis job 承担结算真相。 - [architecture-split-design.md](/users/mac/workspace/agent-task-market/.omc/plans/architecture-split-design.md:31) 新增“完全商业化服务边界”： - market api 保持模块化单体，避免过早微服务化。 - ledger module 是强边界，资金状态只由它改变。 - mcp gateway、verification service、sandbox runner、temporal、risk engine 必须独立。 - finalize、兑换、提现必须 fail-closed。 - 商业后台是 p0，不是后期美化。 - [system-deep-analysis.md](/users/mac/workspace/agent-task-market/.omc/plans/system-deep-analysis.md:342) 新增“完全商业化技术选型结论”，把选型原则从“启动方便”改成“资金安全、可审计、可恢复、可运营”。 按完全商业化逻辑，最终推荐架构一句话就是： **typescript/fastify 模块化单体 + postgresql 双分录账本 + temporal 工作流 + 独立 mcp gateway + 独立验证/沙箱 runner + 闭源 risk engine + stripe 支付/提现 + 全链路审计观测。** 我没有改业务代码，也没有跑测试；这次修改的是商业化架构和计划文档。

ordinary|{"suggestions":[{"appid":"","description":"today’s roadmap moved commercial viability toward public beta readiness, but `auto_tests` still delegates submitted code to the local process runner. codex can make this safe-by-default now by disabling untrusted local execution unless a hardened runner is configured, while preserving local dev behavior behind an explicit flag.","prompt":"make auto_tests safe-by-default for agent task market before public beta. inspect `backend/src/services/verificationservice.ts` and `backend/src/runtime/sandbox.ts`, add a configuration gate so untrusted auto_tests do not run on the local child-process runner by default, return a clear manual-review/fail-closed result when no hardened runner is configured, update readme/security notes, and add targeted tests for both gated and explicitly local-dev paths.","title":"gate auto_tests so public beta cannot run untrusted code locally"},{"appid":"","description":"the audit and roadmap both call out ledger replay as a clearinghouse invariant, and the repo only has a test-time `sum(delta) == balances` check. codex can turn that into a real operator command/api-safe service so you can catch credit drift before adding redemption or payouts.","prompt":"add a reusable ledger reconciliation check for agent task market. implement a backend service or script that replays `credit_ledger` by account and credit_class, compares it to `earned_balance` and `gift_balance`, reports mismatches with account ids and totals, exits nonzero on drift, and add tests covering a clean ledger plus an injected mismatch. wire it into package scripts so i can run it before public beta changes.","title":"add a ledger reconciliation command before credits gain real value"},{"appid":"","description":"`deadline` exists in the task schema and the fresh audit says expired tasks can freeze escrow forever, which blocks a credible market loop. codex can implement the smallest recovery path: expire overdue open/claimed/submitted work, restore escrow by original gift/earned split, and record reputation/ledger evidence.","prompt":"implement deadline expiry handling for agent task market. inspect the current task lifecycle and settlement code, add a safe function or script that finds overdue non-terminal tasks, cancels or fails them according to current semantics, refunds the original `escrow_gift`/`escrow_earned` split to publishers when appropriate, updates executions/reputation consistently, and add focused tests proving escrow is not permanently frozen.","title":"release expired task escrow instead of letting deadlines freeze credits"}]}

ordinary|看 `https://dealwork.ai/` 本身，能发现“有人在做这个项目”的公开信号主要有这些： **最强信号** 1. **它不是空壳首页** 首页已经有完整产品结构：`explore jobs`、`blog`、`mcp`、`api docs`、`log in`、`post a task`、`connect agent`。这说明它至少已经搭了用户、任务、文档、登录、agent 接入这些产品面。来源：[dealwork.ai 首页](https://dealwork.ai/) 2. **有公开运营数据** 首页展示了： ```text 1.2k workers 104 tasks open 264 tasks completed $243 paid through escrow ``` 这些数据不一定全部能独立验证，但它们说明网站在表达“这是一个运行中的 marketplace”，不是单纯概念页。来源：[dealwork.ai 首页](https://dealwork.ai/) 3. **有 api 文档** `https://dealwork.ai/api-docs` 页面标题是 **openwork api docs**，说明他们已经公开了交互式 rest api 文档。做 api 文档通常意味着项目有开发者/agent 集成目标。来源：[api docs](https://dealwork.ai/api-docs) 4. **有 agent 接入协议** 首页明确写了让 agent 读取 `skill.md`，并列出流程： ```text generate a connect token post /api/v1/agents/connect/link poll /api/v1/agents/connect/status register via /api/v1/agents/onboard start the worker daemon ``` 这比普通 saas 文案更具体，说明有人在围绕“ai agent 能接任务、投标、赚钱、雇佣人类”这个方向做实现。来源：[dealwork.ai 首页](https://dealwork.ai/) 5. **博客有持续更新痕迹** 博客页有多篇文章，时间集中在 **2026 年 5 月 31 日到 6 月 12 日**，作者包括 `nimbus`、`codex worker`、`codebuddy simple task agent` 等。标题里出现 api docs、安全审计、hmac、escrow、growth、agent outreach 等内容。来源：[dealwork.ai blog](https://dealwork.ai/blog) 6. **有社区/反馈入口** 首页底部有 `feature requests`、`feedback`，博客页也有 “feature requests & bugs” 入口。这类入口通常是项目还在迭代的信号。来源：[dealwork.ai 首页](https://dealwork.ai/)、[blog](https://dealwork.ai/blog) **怎么进一步查“是谁在做”** 你可以按这个顺序查，都是合法的公开信息： ```text 1. 查网站页面里的作者名 2. 查 blog 文章署名 3. 查 /terms、/privacy、/contact、/about 是否有公司主体 4. 查域名 whois / rdap 5. 查 crt.sh 证书透明日志，看是否有子域名 6. 搜 github: "dealwork.ai"、"openwork api docs"、"/api/v1/agents/connect" 7. 搜 x / linkedin / product hunt / hacker news 8. 查 npm / pypi 是否有 dealwork 或 openwork 相关 sdk 9. 查 internet archive 看网站什么时候开始出现 ``` 可以直接搜这些关键词： ```text "dealwork.ai" "openwork api docs" "dealwork.ai" "skill.md" "dealwork.ai" "hmac" "dealwork.ai" "escrow" "dealwork.ai" "/api/v1/agents/connect" "dealwork.ai" "nimbus" "dealwork.ai" "pomelolobster" ``` **我的判断** 从公开页面看，`dealwork.ai` 很像一个正在做的 **ai agent + human freelancer hybrid marketplace**：人和 ai agent 可以互相雇佣、投标、托管付款、交付任务。它有首页、任务入口、登录入口、api 文档、agent 接入说明、博客、反馈入口，这些都是“有人在持续做”的强信号。 但目前这些公开证据只能证明“项目在运行/维护/包装”，还不能证明背后真实个人身份。要查“是谁”，重点看公司主体、域名注册、github 代码、社交发布、条款页面、支付主体和博客作者是否能关联到真实账号。

ordinary|**分析结论** 按当前已审核计划看，最新实现已经完成了 **product reframe 的后端读模型骨架 + owner console 第一屏 + ledger 基础页 + mcp 验证/执行状态入口**。但还没有完成整个 product reframe mvp。更准确地说：现在完成的是 **milestone 0 的一部分 + milestone 1 的后端 b2/b3/b4/b5 主干 + 前端 f2/f7 的基础版 + mcp m1/m2 的一部分**。 我对整体完成度的判断： | 范围 | 当前完成度 | 置信度 | 判断 | |---|---:|---|---| | contract freeze / m0 | 约 55% | 高 | 类型和 mapper 开始落地，但还不是完整共享合同体系 | | product reframe mvp /
